summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the new 'Reporte de Quebra' module. All core functionality working correctly including search, form submission, and statistics display.
passed_tests: Menu lateral contains 'Reporte de Quebra' option at the bottom
Page /quebras loads successfully with two tabs: 'Reportar Quebra' and 'Estatisticas'
Tool search functionality works - typing 'INS' returns 5 results
Successfully added tool (INS-001) to report list
Submit button enables when form is complete
Success message appears after form submission: 'Quebra Reportada com Sucesso!'
Statistics tab displays KPI cards with data (Total: R$ 45,90, 1 Ferramenta Quebrada, CNC-01 machine, INS-001 tool)
Report history table shows submitted data correctly
Dark theme with red accents displays correctly
